title: ExGal-4
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:ExGal4map-FF48.png|thumb|right|270px|A map of the ExGal-4 facility on [[Belkadan/Legends|Belkadan]]]]

'''ExGal-4''' was an [[Extragalactic Society]] [[Listening post/Legends|listening post]] on [[Belkadan/Legends|Belkadan]] in the [[Dalonbian sector/Legends|Dalonbian sector]].

The [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warrior caste|warrior]] [[Yomin Carr]] infiltrated the facility in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. Releasing the [[dweebit]] upon Belkadan, Carr enabled [[yorik coral]] to grow on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

There were 14 other workers at ExGal-4, one of which was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] spy, including:

*[[Danni Quee]]
*[[Bensin Tomri]]
*[[Garth Breise]]
*[[Tee-ubo Doole]]
*[[Cho Badeleg]]
*[[Luther De'Ono]]
*[[Bendodi Ballow-Reese]]
*[[Jerem Cadmir]]
*[[Lysire Donabelle]]
*One unnamed woman
*Four unnamed men

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{C|mentioned as a "listening post"}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{Mo}}
